steps.title: Spot the shared location
steps.content: The notes identify both the Kemp's ridley and olive ridley as sea turtles found in the Atlantic Ocean. This geographic similarity is the key fact to emphasize.

steps.title: Match similarity to the answer choices
steps.content: Choice C opens with “Both” and states these two species share the Atlantic Ocean. The other three fail to emphasize similarity: A focuses on only one species, B uses “while” to contrast their scientific names, and D explicitly calls them “different species.” That matches choice C — C is correct.
